languages.text: "Возможно, петлю остановит критическая коррекция привычного курса событий внутри. Сожалею, но я не могу произвести триангуляцию сам — у меня нет даже данных о том, сколько именно я здесь нахожусь". {n}Гудение внутри тела магоса становится неровным.{/n} "Вы располагаете планом, способным изменить текущую траекторию действий?"

traits.locale_text: [draft]Экзальт выдвигает предположение, что что-то должно нарушить аномалию, критические несовпадения с привычным циклом. У нас есть план?

languages.text: "Perhaps the loop will be stopped by a critical correction in the usual course of events within. Regrettably, I cannot perform the triangulation myself — I lack even the data to indicate exactly how long I have been here." {n}The humming inside the Magos's body becomes irregular.{/n} "Do you have a plan capable of altering the current trajectory of events?"
languages.original_text: "Возможно, петлю остановит критическая коррекция привычного курса событий внутри. Сожалею, но я не могу произвести триангуляцию сам — у меня нет даже данных о том, сколько именно я здесь нахожусь". {n}Гудение внутри тела магоса становится неровным.{/n} "Вы располагаете планом, способным изменить текущую траекторию действий?"

Regrettably, I cannot perform the triangulation myself — I lack even the data to indicate exactly how long I have been here." {n}The humming inside the Magos's body becomes irregular.{/n} "Do you have a plan capable of altering the current trajectory of events?"

Regrettably, I cannot perform the triangulation myself — I lack even the data to indicate exactly how long I have been here." {n}The humming inside the Magos's body becomes irregular.{/n} "Do you have a plan capable of altering the current trajectory of events?"

"Perhaps the loop will be stopped by a critical correction in the usual course of events within. Regrettably, I cannot perform the triangulation myself — I lack even the data to indicate exactly how long I have been here." {n}The humming inside the Magos's body becomes irregular.{/n} "Do you have a plan capable of altering the current trajectory of events?"

languages.text: “或许，只要对循环事件的常规进程进行关键性修正，就能终止这个循环。很遗憾，我无法自行完成三角测量，我甚至缺乏自己身处此地确切时长的数据。”{n}贤者体内的嗡鸣声变得不规律起来。{/n}“你是否有能够改变当前事件轨迹的方案？”
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the loop will be stopped by a critical correction in the usual course of events within. Regrettably, I cannot perform the triangulation myself — I lack even the data to indicate exactly how long I have been here." {n}The humming inside the Magos's body becomes irregular.{/n} "Do you have a plan capable of altering the current trajectory of events?"

traits.locale_text: “或许，只要对循环事件的常规进程进行关键性修正，就能终止这个循环。很遗憾，我无法自行完成三角测量，我甚至缺乏自己身处此地确切时长的数据。”{n}贤者体内的嗡鸣声变得不规律起来。{/n}“你是否有能够改变当前事件轨迹的方案？”

languages.text: « Il pourrait être possible de mettre fin à la boucle en apportant une correction déterminante au cours normal des événements qui s'y produisent. Malheureusement, je ne peux pas effectuer la triangulation moi-même, car je ne dispose même pas des données nécessaires pour savoir depuis combien de temps je suis ici. » {n}Le bourdonnement du corps du magos se fait irrégulier.{/n} « Avez-vous un plan qui permettrait de modifier la trajectoire actuelle des événements ? »
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the loop will be stopped by a critical correction in the usual course of events within. Regrettably, I cannot perform the triangulation myself — I lack even the data to indicate exactly how long I have been here." {n}The humming inside the Magos's body becomes irregular.{/n} "Do you have a plan capable of altering the current trajectory of events?"

traits.locale_text: « Il pourrait être possible de mettre fin à la boucle en apportant une correction déterminante au cours normal des événements qui s'y produisent. Malheureusement, je ne peux pas effectuer la triangulation moi-même, car je ne dispose même pas des données nécessaires pour savoir depuis combien de temps je suis ici. » {n}Le bourdonnement du corps du magos se fait irrégulier.{/n} « Avez-vous un plan qui permettrait de modifier la trajectoire actuelle des événements ? »

languages.text: "Belki de döngü, içerisindeki olayların olağan seyrinde gerçekleştirilecek kilit bir düzeltmeyle durdurulabilir. Ne yazık ki nirengiyi kendim alamıyorum. Tam olarak ne kadardır burada bulunduğumu gösterecek veriye sahip değilim." {n}Magos'un vücudundaki uğultu düzensizleşiyor.{/n} "Olayların mevcut rotasını değiştirebilecek bir planınız var mı?"
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the loop will be stopped by a critical correction in the usual course of events within. Regrettably, I cannot perform the triangulation myself — I lack even the data to indicate exactly how long I have been here." {n}The humming inside the Magos's body becomes irregular.{/n} "Do you have a plan capable of altering the current trajectory of events?"

traits.locale_text: "Belki de döngü, içerisindeki olayların olağan seyrinde gerçekleştirilecek kilit bir düzeltmeyle durdurulabilir. Ne yazık ki nirengiyi kendim alamıyorum. Tam olarak ne kadardır burada bulunduğumu gösterecek veriye sahip değilim." {n}Magos'un vücudundaki uğultu düzensizleşiyor.{/n} "Olayların mevcut rotasını değiştirebilecek bir planınız var mı?"

languages.text: «Tal vez el bucle se detenga ante una corrección crítica en el curso de sus eventos habituales. Lamentablemente, no puedo realizar la triangulación yo mismo, ya que carezco incluso de los datos que indican cuánto tiempo llevo aquí». {n}El zumbido del interior del magos se vuelve irregular.{/n} «¿Tiene algún plan capaz de alterar la trayectoria actual de los eventos?».
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the loop will be stopped by a critical correction in the usual course of events within. Regrettably, I cannot perform the triangulation myself — I lack even the data to indicate exactly how long I have been here." {n}The humming inside the Magos's body becomes irregular.{/n} "Do you have a plan capable of altering the current trajectory of events?"

traits.locale_text: «Tal vez el bucle se detenga ante una corrección crítica en el curso de sus eventos habituales. Lamentablemente, no puedo realizar la triangulación yo mismo, ya que carezco incluso de los datos que indican cuánto tiempo llevo aquí». {n}El zumbido del interior del magos se vuelve irregular.{/n} «¿Tiene algún plan capaz de alterar la trayectoria actual de los eventos?».

languages.text: "Vielleicht wird die Schleife durch eine kritische Korrektur der üblichen Ereignisse gestoppt. Bedauerlicherweise kann ich die Triangulation nicht selbst durchführen ... ich kann nicht einmal exakt bestimmen, wie lange ich schon hier bin." {n}Das Summen im Körper des Magos gerät ins Stocken.{/n} "Habt Ihr einen Plan, der die derzeitige Trajektorie der Ereignisse beeinflussen könnte?"
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the loop will be stopped by a critical correction in the usual course of events within. Regrettably, I cannot perform the triangulation myself — I lack even the data to indicate exactly how long I have been here." {n}The humming inside the Magos's body becomes irregular.{/n} "Do you have a plan capable of altering the current trajectory of events?"

traits.locale_text: "Vielleicht wird die Schleife durch eine kritische Korrektur der üblichen Ereignisse gestoppt. Bedauerlicherweise kann ich die Triangulation nicht selbst durchführen ... ich kann nicht einmal exakt bestimmen, wie lange ich schon hier bin." {n}Das Summen im Körper des Magos gerät ins Stocken.{/n} "Habt Ihr einen Plan, der die derzeitige Trajektorie der Ereignisse beeinflussen könnte?"

languages.text: 「このループは、内部で起こる通常の流れの中で、重要な修正によって止まるかもしれない。残念ながら、私は自分で三角測量を行うことができない。ここにいる期間を正確に示すデータすら持たないからだ。」{n}マゴスの体内の唸り声は不規則になる。{/n}「現在の流れを変えることができる計画はありますか？」
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the loop will be stopped by a critical correction in the usual course of events within. Regrettably, I cannot perform the triangulation myself — I lack even the data to indicate exactly how long I have been here." {n}The humming inside the Magos's body becomes irregular.{/n} "Do you have a plan capable of altering the current trajectory of events?"
